title: Loctite Super Glue Power Gel Control, Flexible Super Glue Gel, with Non-Drip Formula for Vertical Applications,with Precise Nozzle, Clear, 4g (Pack of 1)
features: Special Formula – Thanks to its rubber-infused and non-drip formula the adhesive provides powerful and precise bonds even on flexible materials and vertical surfaces
Universal Use* – The strong glue is ideal for use on vertical and porous surfaces. It works as wood glue, plastic glue, on rubber, leather, porcelain and paper
High Control – The all purpose adhesive features an easy-grip squeeze bottle, a long nozzle for smooth and precise applications, as well as an anti-clog cap
Resistant Glue – The all purpose glue is resistant to both weather and shock while being able to withstand heavy loads. It bonds in seconds and dries transparent
Package Contents – Loctite Super Glue Power Gel, universal glue, convenient tube for easy-grip control with longer nozzle, weather and shock resistant, dries transparent, 1x4g

Not suitable for glass, expanded polystyrene, Teflon, Styropor and synthetic fibres) Suitable for various materials such as cardboard, wood, rubber, metal, porcelain, ceramic and even plastic (except PE, PP or PFTE) Suitable for various materials such as metal, china, plastic, rubber, leather, wood (not suitable for PE, PP, PFTE, vinyl, expanded polystyrene, glass, synthetic fabric) Suitable for various materials such as wood, rubber, metal, leather, china, plastics (not suitable for waxy or soft plastics such as PP, PE, PFTE or vinyl as well as for expanded polystyrene, glass or synthetic fabric) Suitable for glass, crystal, tinted glass, glassworks, opaque glass & blown glass (do not use for items exposed to high temperatures. Not suitable for PE, PP or PFTE, silicone rubber, very soft leather or foams.
